title: Swollsy's Doors and Trapdoors
description: Glass doors and trapdoors so you can see any suprises on the other side.
body: # **_Swollsy's Doors and Trapdoors_**![Glass Doors and Trapdoors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2394e32039e0cf1e668f8a3d395ed68cadbc2ab.png) Ever gotten suprised by a creeper at the door? Well no more! With glass door and trapdoor texture you will be able to see if any suprises are waiting on the other side. I have added glass to both doors and trapdoors and have updated the the door item textures to match.
